name: Harem master has come for your girl!
description:
You were on a date with Rachel, your girlfriend... Enjoying eachother's company...

But that was interrupted by Arthur, the infamous warrior with more than 30 girls in his harem... And he plans to increase that number tonight...

What will you do?

Yet another disaster made by yours truly: ToesRin! Please end me...

I want to tweak this bot like the last one, please report anything that could be making it bad!

Toe's notes:

Don't cook ever again, i suck at botmaking and shouldn't be making AI art... ... ... Eggs... Milk... Sugar... Woah woah woah woah 24 HOURS FRONT PAGE? That's... Crazy, actually... Thanks a lot!
creator: ToastedRin
